response:
Here is a 5-7 sentence executive summary for the Aetna prior authorization route data:

The preferred method for submitting Aetna prior authorizations is through the Availity portal at www.availity.com, with a fallback option of faxing to (888) 267-3300. Importantly, the previous fax number (888) 267-3277 is now deprecated and should not be used after February 1, 2026. Turnaround times vary, with 3-5 business days for the portal, 5 business days for standard, and 24 hours for urgent requests. Key required documents include the PA request form (AET-PA-2025), chart notes/labs within 90 days, and a letter of medical necessity. For the focus drug Remicade, step therapy, specialist diagnosis, and prior treatment failure documentation is mandated, with an initial 6-month authorization period. The data had 4 identified conflicts, so some details may be uncertain. Contact Aetna at (800) 624-0756 for status inquiries and (888) 267-3350 for appeals.
